_comment: PATCH: Merge these index entries into the existing firestore.indexes.json
_instruction: Add the entries from the 'indexes' array below into your existing firestore.indexes.json indexes array.

indexes._comment: roles: active + title for ordered list (GET /roles sorted alphabetically)
roles: active + category + title (GET /roles?category=X sorted alphabetically)
userProfiles: userId equality (direct doc access — no composite index needed, listed for documentation)
indexes._note: Single-field queries on the document ID do not require a composite index. This entry is documentation only.
